overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving at high speed along an elevated highway through a futuristic metropolis. The journey transitions from open sky conditions with towering glass skyscrapers into a covered glass-enclosed walkway with heavy traffic and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with overhead overpasses

events.description: emerging from shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight
blue sports car overtakes on the left at high speed

agents.ego_description: driving along the elevated highway, accelerating from shadow into sunlight

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking the ego vehicle at high speed

entered.detail: towering glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the right side
elevated highway structure casting shadows on the road below
solid concrete safety barrier running along the right edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving on an elevated highway in shadow from an overpass, then emerges into bright sunlight. A blue sports car overtakes on the left. The mega skyscraper looms ahead on the right while concrete barriers line the road edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with overhead directional signage

events.description: passing under green highway directional signs indicating City Center
approaching the entrance to a covered glass walkway structure ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed along the open highway, approaching the covered section

entered.detail: overhead green highway signs with white text indicating directions to City Center
large vertical yellow billboard with black text and graphics mounted on the right side structure

segments.scene_description: Driving through the open highway section with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The camera passes under green highway signage while approaching a large yellow billboard and the entrance to a covered walkway structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with glass walls and metal framework

events.description: entering the covered glass walkway structure with enclosed walls and roof
passing through alternating bands of light and shadow cast by the glass roof structure

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed glass walkway, navigating through moderate traffic with vehicles passing on the left

notable_agents.action: white sports car with blue racing stripes overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal enclosed walkway with transparent walls and angled roof panels
geometric metal framework supporting the glass roof with triangular truss patterns
illuminated neon signs and digital billboards on the left side buildings visible through the structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered glass walkway with transparent walls and a metal framework roof. Light filters through creating dynamic shadow patterns on the road. Heavy traffic flows alongside with various futuristic vehicles overtaking. Neon advertisements and the mega skyscraper are visible through the glass walls as the drive continues through the enclosed corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive along an elevated highway that transitions from an open, sun-drenched cityscape into a neon-lit enclosed corridor. It begins in the shadow of an overpass before emerging into bright sunlight, where a blue sports car overtakes the vehicle as a massive skyscraper looms to the right. As the camera passes under green highway signage and a large yellow billboard, the open sky begins to disappear. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a covered glass walkway, where a metal framework roof creates dynamic shadow patterns across the road. Finally, the environment becomes a dense enclosed corridor of heavy traffic and transparent walls, with neon advertisements and the towering skyscraper visible through the glass.
